ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of property sale */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who handled the sale */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sale */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Commission amount for the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was closed */,
  "closing_costs" REAL /* Closing costs associated with the sale */,
  "appraisal_value" REAL /* Appraisal value of the property at the time of sale */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Summary of the inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, broker, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the property */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the neighborhood is located */,
  "average_home_price" REAL /* Average home price in the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_price" REAL /* Median home price in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exteriors" (
  "exterior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exterior feature */,
  "exterior_name" TEXT /* Name of the exterior feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the exterior feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exterior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garages" (
  "garage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garage */,
  "garage_name" TEXT /* Name of the garage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the garage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garage_id")
)
